title: Dyke Systems Ltd

venue.name: WundaBarn at The SpiegelGardens
venue.address: Victoria Gardens, Brighton and Hove, East Sussex

reviews.excerpt: Fag Packet are a London-based cabaret duo making their Edinburgh Festival Fringe debut. Their act features two American, repressed housewife types, living their best lives at the centre of a pyramid scheme, with the audience cast as their lucky new potential recruits. They can’t wait to tell you all about the DYKE System.The show draws heavily on drag traditions in terms of characterisation, comed
